records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman! Trick or treat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman! Trick or treat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman! Trick or treat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You promised to give us snacks this Halloween, so we're here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You promised to give us snacks this Halloween, so we're here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You promised to give us snacks this Halloween, so we're here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sky, it's rude to barge in like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sky, it's rude to barge in like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sky, it's rude to barge in like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Did we startle you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Did we startle you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Did we startle you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. I'm the one who told you that you're welcome anytime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. I'm the one who told you that you're welcome anytime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. I'm the one who told you that you're welcome anytime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, lemme see here... What would you girls like...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, lemme see here... What would you girls like...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, lemme see here... What would you girls like...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... are you sure it's okay while you're working?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... are you sure it's okay while you're working?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... are you sure it's okay while you're working?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu fu... It's okay even if you're not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu fu... It's okay even if you're not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu fu... It's okay even if you're not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think the time has come to test my newly developed "10-second Fatigue Relief!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think the time has come to test my newly developed "10-second Fatigue Relief!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think the time has come to test my newly developed "10-second Fatigue Relief!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heroes are always exhausted, so I thought a device like this will come in handy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heroes are always exhausted, so I thought a device like this will come in handy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heroes are always exhausted, so I thought a device like this will come in handy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. You used that on Sky when she was dozing off and never used it again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. You used that on Sky when she was dozing off and never used it again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. You used that on Sky when she was dozing off and never used it again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let's stop bothering her, girls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let's stop bothering her, girls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let's stop bothering her, girls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you know what happens to kids that barge into the chairwoman's office?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you know what happens to kids that barge into the chairwoman's office?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you know what happens to kids that barge into the chairwoman's office?

records.m_Talk_ENG: None of them could leave until they were completely full from all the snacks I served.
records.m_Talk_DEU: None of them could leave until they were completely full from all the snacks I served.
records.m_Talk_FRA: None of them could leave until they were completely full from all the snacks I served.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, sit down. Why don't you all try the new chocolate vanilla pastry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, sit down. Why don't you all try the new chocolate vanilla pastry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, sit down. Why don't you all try the new chocolate vanilla pastry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! Thank you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! Thank you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! Thank you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...! It's so delicious!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...! It's so delicious!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...! It's so delicious!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I usually get sick of eating sweet things after a while, but this is a first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I usually get sick of eating sweet things after a while, but this is a first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I usually get sick of eating sweet things after a while, but this is a first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rumors were true about how you have all the world's snacks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rumors were true about how you have all the world's snacks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rumors were true about how you have all the world's snacks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. My friends send them to me frequently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. My friends send them to me frequently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. My friends send them to me frequently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to see that you're enjoying them. Come visit more often even when it's not Halloween.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to see that you're enjoying them. Come visit more often even when it's not Halloween.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to see that you're enjoying them. Come visit more often even when it's not Halloween.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Ms. Chairwoman? I've been thinking about this for a while now, but is this really your office?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Ms. Chairwoman? I've been thinking about this for a while now, but is this really your office?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Ms. Chairwoman? I've been thinking about this for a while now, but is this really your office?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it in a book once, and the old classroom looked exactly like your office.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it in a book once, and the old classroom looked exactly like your office.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it in a book once, and the old classroom looked exactly like your office.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. We were thinking that this classroom is just a disguise and there is actually a secret base hidden somewhere here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. We were thinking that this classroom is just a disguise and there is actually a secret base hidden somewhere here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. We were thinking that this classroom is just a disguise and there is actually a secret base hidden somewhere here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Living a double life of a chairwoman in the morning and a hero at night!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Living a double life of a chairwoman in the morning and a hero at night!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Living a double life of a chairwoman in the morning and a hero at night!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, that's an interesting thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, that's an interesting thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, that's an interesting thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I designed this office to look like the classroom from when I attended school.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I designed this office to look like the classroom from when I attended school.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I designed this office to look like the classroom from when I attended school.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just loved that time of my life...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just loved that time of my life...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just loved that time of my life...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! Are those portraits back there of your friends?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! Are those portraits back there of your friends?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! Are those portraits back there of your friends?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a little rough, but their characteristics are well-defined.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a little rough, but their characteristics are well-defined.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a little rough, but their characteristics are well-defined.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person on the bottom right is you, right, Ms. Chairwoman?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person on the bottom right is you, right, Ms. Chairwoman?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person on the bottom right is you, right, Ms. Chairwoman?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. What a keen eye you have!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. What a keen eye you have!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. What a keen eye you have!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?! Who's the one with the <color=#ffd34c>robot mask</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?! Who's the one with the <color=#ffd34c>robot mask</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?! Who's the one with the <color=#ffd34c>robot mask</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really have a hero friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really have a hero friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really have a hero friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, he...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, he...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, he...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He was <color=#ffd34c>the best hero</color>. He saved us all a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He was <color=#ffd34c>the best hero</color>. He saved us all a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He was <color=#ffd34c>the best hero</color>. He saved us all a long time ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Are you still close to him? Could we meet him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Are you still close to him? Could we meet him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Are you still close to him? Could we meet him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, that's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, that's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, that's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman, it's almost time for the beta testing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman, it's almost time for the beta testing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman, it's almost time for the beta testing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. Is it time already? I'm really sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. Is it time already? I'm really sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. Is it time already? I'm really sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The timing couldn't be any worse... But oh, well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The timing couldn't be any worse... But oh, well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The timing couldn't be any worse... But oh, well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come visit again next time, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come visit again next time, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come visit again next time, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today's the test day, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today's the test day, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today's the test day, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doing a beta test with the Academy's chairwoman. Your connections weren't just rumors after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doing a beta test with the Academy's chairwoman. Your connections weren't just rumors after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doing a beta test with the Academy's chairwoman. Your connections weren't just rumors after all.

records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be a great headliner that you two collaborated as partners.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be a great headliner that you two collaborated as partners.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's <color=#ffd34c>four</color>, actually... It always has been...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's <color=#ffd34c>four</color>, actually... It always has been...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's <color=#ffd34c>four</color>, actually... It always has been...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's only three people... for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's only three people... for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's only three people... for today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Who are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Who are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...My friends.
